title: Stir Fry Beef
description: A classic Chinese dish with tender beef and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together beef and peppercorns.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the ginger and onion and cook until the onion is translucent, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the snow peas and cook until tender, about 2-3 minutes.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the beef is cooked through.
